note: Local CHJ/UniDic-style schema. This is not a CHJ dump; it is a small project-owned morphology SSOT shaped after CHJ/UniDic fields.
unit_notes: short_unit is used for grammar evaluation: particles, auxiliaries, inflection.
long_unit is used for collocation/style chunks.
surface/search by 書字形出現形 keeps spelling and inflection.
lemma/search by 語彙素 absorbs orthographic and inflectional variation.
string search is used first when the local unit split or lemma is uncertain.
